$schema: Allow-list. Add entries only with justification + reference fields. See spec §5.5.

checks.justification: Local verifier-server runs plain HTTP for simplicity. The library emits the request_uri scheme it is asked to publish; nothing prevents HTTPS publication. Production CI should terminate TLS in front of the verifier (nginx sidecar) — tracked as a follow-up. Not a library defect.
Same as EnsureRequestUriIsHttps — response_uri inherits the verifier-server's HTTP scheme. Library accepts any HTTPS URL; harness limitation only.
